resources.string: Something went wrong. Please try again.
No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
The request timed out. Please try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
A conflict occurred. Please try again.
Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
A server error occurred. Please try again later.
Received unexpected data. Please try again.
Invalid email or password.
No account was found with these details.
An account with this email already exists.
This password is too weak. Please choose a stronger one.
Sign-in was cancelled.
Social sign-in failed. Please try again.
Permission denied.
This file is too large.
Upload failed. Please try again.
Recording failed. Please try again.
This format is not supported.
Location services are disabled.
Location permission was denied.
Location is currently unavailable.
